settings.custom_liquid:
<style>
#scroll-video {
  width: 100%; /* Default: full width for mobile */
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  margin: 0 auto;
  overflow: hidden; /* 
Prevent overflow for future styling */
  box-shadow: 0px 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25); /* Shadow for both mobile and desktop */
}

@media (min-width: 768px) {
  #scroll-video {
    width: 70%; /* Adjust for desktop (70% of container width) */
    border: 2px solid black; /* Thin black border for desktop */
    border-radius: 12px; /* Rounded corners only for desktop */
    box-shadow: 0px 8px 16px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); /* Stronger shadow for desktop */
  }
}
</style>

<video id="scroll-video" muted playsinline autoplay loop>
  <source src="https://cdn.shopify.com/videos/c/o/v/bc8530ce1b424ac1b0e13c1cbbe282fe.mp4">
  Your browser does not support the video tag.
</video>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  const video = document.querySelector('#scroll-video');

  // Ensure the video is muted programmatically
  video.muted = true;

  // Play the video automatically when it comes into view
  const playVideo = (entries, observer) => {
    entries.forEach(entry => {
      if (entry.isIntersecting) {
        video.play();
        observer.disconnect(); // Stop observing once video starts playing
      }
    });
  };

  const observer = new IntersectionObserver(playVideo, {
    threshold: 0.5, // Trigger when 50% of the video is visible
  });

  observer.observe(video);
});
</script>
